body: Dr. Meera, JIDA Oct 2026, p.14 mein ek interesting study aayi hai. High-risk adult caries ke liye 3-month fluoride varnish recall 6-month recall se 38% better perform kar raha hai. Aapke clinic mein 124 high-risk adults hain—kya aap chahte hain main in patients ke liye ek follow-up WhatsApp draft karun?
rationale: Sharing a clinical insight relevant to the merchant's specific high-risk patient cohort to drive engagement. [anchor=JIDA Oct 2026, p.14, lever=reciprocity(+specificity), trigger=research_digest:u2, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Dr. Bharat, aapke calls is hafte 50% drop huye hain compared to your typical baseline of 12. Aapka profile abhi unverified hai aur koi active offers bhi nahi dikh rahe, which might be affecting your visibility in Andheri West. Kya main aapke profile ka ek quick 30-second audit karun to see what's missing?
rationale: Addressing a significant 50% drop in calls by linking it to the merchant's unverified status and lack of offers. [anchor=-0.5, lever=loss_aversion(+reciprocity), trigger=perf_dip:u4, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body:
Hi Priya, aapka 6_month_cleaning due hai. Your last visit was on 2026-05-12, and it's important to maintain your oral hygiene to avoid plaque buildup. Humne aapke liye slots block kiye hain:

Reply 1 for Wed 5 Nov, 6pm
Reply 2 for Thu 6 Nov, 5pm

Ya phir koi aur time batayein jo aapko suit kare.
rationale: Re-engaging a lapsed patient for a routine cleaning using the exact last visit date and specific slots to reduce friction. [anchor=2026-05-12, lever=loss_aversion(+binary_commitment), trigger=recall_due:u3, send_as=merchant_on_behalf, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Dr. Bharat, aapka Pro subscription 12 days mein expire ho raha hai. Last 30 days mein Bharat Dental Care profile par 980 views aaye hain, par calls 50% dip hui hain. I've analyzed the new JIDA fluoride recall guidelines and the aligner trend in Mumbai that we can use to fix this. Agle month ka growth plan discuss karein?
rationale: Using loss aversion by highlighting the 12-day renewal window alongside the 980 views the merchant is currently receiving to justify the Pro plan value. [anchor=12, lever=loss_aversion(+specificity), trigger=renewal_due:u4, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Dr. Meera, DCI circular 2026-11-04 ke according radiograph dose limits change ho rahe hain, effective 2026-12-15. IOPA exposure limit ab 1.0 mSv hai—isliye D-speed film ab compliant nahi rahegi. Digital RVG sensors are safe, but agar aap film use karte hain toh E-speed par switch karna hoga. Kya main aapke clinic ke liye ek short compliance checklist bhej doon?
rationale: Notifying the merchant of a critical regulatory deadline regarding X-ray safety to ensure compliance before the cutoff. [anchor=2026-12-15, lever=loss_aversion(+effort_externalization), trigger=regulation_change:u4, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Dr. Meera, aapke clinic se 1.3 km door ek naya clinic 'Smile Studio' open hua hai. Unka cleaning offer ₹199 hai, jabki aapka ₹299 hai. Aapka CTR abhi 0.021 hai, jo peer median se thoda kam hai. Competition badhne se visibility par asar pad sakta hai. Kya main aapke listing aur unke listing ka ek 1-page comparison report share karoon?
rationale: Alerting the merchant to a nearby competitor with a lower price point while referencing their current CTR to encourage a competitive audit. [anchor=1.3, lever=loss_aversion(+reciprocity), trigger=competitor_opened:u2, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1]

body: Hi Pooja, Bangalore mein 30-50 age group ke corporate clients ke beech PT sessions ki demand 38% YoY badh gayi hai. Aapke Koramangala location ke liye '2x/week PT' package kaafi effective ho sakta hai to capture this trend. Kya main aapke liye iska ek draft offer create karun?
rationale: Leveraging the PT demand trend from the digest to suggest a high-margin service package for the merchant's specific demographic. [anchor=38%, lever=reciprocity(+curiosity), trigger=research_digest:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Akash, Fit Republic ki profile views 3185 touch kar rahi hain, par calls aur leads mein thoda dip dikh raha hai. Gachibowli mein abhi boutique studios ka footfall badh raha hai, especially women members mein. Aapka current CTR 0.019 hai—kya hum aapke offers update karke ek 30-sec audit karein to see what's missing?
rationale: The merchant has high views but low conversion (calls/leads) compared to the peer average CTR of 0.045. Using the boutique studio trend as a diagnostic reason for the dip. [anchor=3185, lever=loss_aversion(+reciprocity), trigger=perf_dip:u3, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1]

body: Hi Rashmi, we've missed seeing you at PowerHouse Fitness! It's been a while since your last visit on 2026-02-28. We know life gets busy, but don't let your fitness progress slip away. We've recently updated our evening HIIT schedule which would be perfect for your weight loss focus. Would you like to drop by this week for a quick catch-up and a workout on us?
rationale: Re-engaging a hard-lapsed member by referencing their last visit date and aligning with their previous weight loss focus to encourage a return. [anchor=2026-02-28, lever=reciprocity(+loss_aversion), trigger=customer_lapsed_hard:u3, send_as=merchant_on_behalf, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Padma, aapke calls 15% badh gaye hain pichle 7 days mein. It looks like the kids yoga interest is picking up footfall already. Kya aapne offline bhi kuch naya start kiya hai to drive this spike?
rationale: Celebrating a 15% call spike likely driven by the recent kids yoga planning to understand if offline efforts contributed. [anchor=0.15, lever=reciprocity(+asking), trigger=perf_spike:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Pooja, Bangalore mein wedding aur festival season aane wala hai and historically August-October mein repeat clients shape up karne ke liye wapas aate hain. Aapka current CTR 0.042 kaafi solid hai. Kya hum 'Bend & Burn' ke liye ek special festival-prep offer draft karein to re-engage your old members? Reply YES agar aap interested hain.
rationale: Leveraging the seasonal beat of wedding/festival prep (Aug-Oct) to drive re-engagement for a gym with good existing CTR. [anchor=0.042, lever=specificity(+curiosity), trigger=festival_upcoming:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Karan, aapka Iron Forge Fitness Pro subscription 85 days mein renew hona hai. Pichle 30 days mein aapne 2055 views aur 23 calls generate kiye hain magicpin se. Footfall maintain karne ke liye ye momentum zaroori hai, especially since views are up by 22.0% this week. Agle mahine ke growth plans discuss karein?
rationale: Reminding the merchant of their upcoming renewal by anchoring on their strong 30-day view count and recent growth trend to demonstrate platform value. [anchor=2055, lever=loss_aversion(+specificity), trigger=renewal_due:u4, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Bharti ji, Wellness Cart ke liye ek important update hai. Multi-pharmacy aggregate Apr 2026 ke data ke hisaab se summer demand shift ho rahi hai—ORS aur sunscreen ki demand 40% up hai, jabki cold/cough 60% down. Aapne counter visibility change ki? Agar aap chahein toh main aapke repeat customers ke liye ek summer-care reminder draft kar sakti hoon.
rationale: Using seasonal demand shift data to provide actionable merchandising advice for the pharmacy. [anchor=Multi-pharmacy aggregate Apr 2026, lever=reciprocity+curiosity, trigger=research_digest:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Anil ji, Healthwell Pharmacy ki profile views is hafte 23.0% niche gayi hain. Summer demand shift ki wajah se ORS aur sunscreen ki search badh rahi hai, par aapke page par views kam ho rahe hain. Kya main aapki profile ka ek quick audit karun to see what needs updating?
rationale: Noticed a significant dip in views and used the seasonal summer trend to offer a diagnostic audit. [anchor=-23.0%, lever=loss_aversion(+reciprocity), trigger=perf_dip:u3, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Namaste Mr. Sharma ji, Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy se Ramesh baat kar raha hoon. Aapki metformin aur telmisartan ki medicines jo aapne 2026-03-26 ko li thi, woh ab khatam hone wali hongi. Humne aapka refill pack ready rakha hai. Kya hum kal morning delivery bhej dein? Reply YES to confirm.
rationale: Proactive refill reminder for a senior chronic patient to ensure medication adherence and leverage the saved delivery preference. [anchor=2026-03-26, lever=reciprocity(+binary_commitment), trigger=chronic_refill_due:u3, send_as=merchant_on_behalf, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Vikas ji, Lucknow mein garmi badh rahi hai aur summer season ke saath ORS aur anti-fungals ki demand 40% tak badh jati hai. Sunrise Medicos par abhi koi active offer nahi dikh raha hai—kya hum 'Free Home Delivery > ₹499' ya summer essentials par koi special deal live karein? Isse Gomti Nagar ke customers ko kaafi help milegi. Bataiye, kya main ek draft taiyaar karun?
rationale: Skipped the generic festival trigger for a more relevant seasonal beat (summer demand) since the merchant has no active offers and the payload was a placeholder. [anchor=ORS, sunscreen, anti-fungal up 40%, lever=specificity(+reciprocity), trigger=festival_upcoming:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Ramesh ji, CDSCO alert ke mutabik manufacturer X ne atorvastatin ke batches AT2024-1102 aur AT2024-1108 recall kiye hain. Aapke repeat-Rx list mein se jin customers ne ye molecule liya hai, unhe inform karna sahi rahega for LDL control. Kya main un affected customers ki list share karun?
rationale: Providing the specific batch numbers from the recall alert to help the merchant manage patient safety and inventory. [anchor=AT2024-1102, lever=loss_aversion(+reciprocity), trigger=supply_alert:u5, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Vinod ji, aapka trial 5 days mein end ho raha hai. Family Health Pharmacy ne pichle 30 days mein 5870 views aur 12 calls generate kiye hain magicpin par. In leads aur visibility ko continue rakhne ke liye renewal zaroori hai. Kya main aapko next month ke growth plans share karoon?
rationale: Using loss aversion by highlighting the high view count achieved during the trial period to encourage renewal before the 5-day window closes. [anchor=5870, lever=loss_aversion(+specificity), trigger=renewal_due:u4, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Suresh, corporate bulk thali ke liye we can bundle your Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149 with a beverage and free delivery for orders above 10 units. Indiranagar ke offices mein lunch delivery ka kaafi demand hai. Kya main aapke liye ek draft package create kar doon?
rationale: Continuing the corporate thali discussion by proposing a bundle based on their existing successful thali price point. [anchor=corporate_bulk_thali_package, lever=effort_externalization, trigger=active_planning_intent:u4, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Karim, aapke calls last 30 days mein 54 tak pahunch gaye hain—kaafi sahi growth hai. Anna Nagar mein footfall badh raha hai ya aapne menu mein kuch naya add kiya hai? I'd love to know what's working for Kabab Junction so we can keep this momentum going.
rationale: Acknowledging the positive call volume to build rapport and understand the driver behind the spike. [anchor=54, lever=reciprocity(+asking), trigger=perf_spike:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Dipti, we are looking forward to seeing you and the family tomorrow! Just confirming your booking for the Sunday Brunch. We have kept your table ready for a relaxed afternoon. Reply YES to confirm or let us know if there is any change in plans.
rationale: Confirming a lapsed customer's preferred slot to ensure table turnover and reduce no-shows. [anchor=sunday_brunch, lever=binary_commitment, trigger=appointment_tomorrow:u2, send_as=merchant_on_behalf, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Suresh, quick heads-up — aapke delivery timing ko lekar 4 reviews aaye hain last 30 days mein. Ek customer ne likha: "took 50 mins for a 15 min ride". Delivery late hone se repeat customers par asar pad sakta hai. Kya main in reviews ke liye ek quick response template draft kar doon?
rationale: Notifying the merchant about a rising negative review theme using a specific customer quote to drive operational awareness. [anchor=took 50 mins for a 15 min ride, lever=reciprocity, trigger=review_theme_emerged:u3, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Suresh ji, aaj Delhi mein DC vs MI match hai Arun Jaitley Stadium par. Data ke hisaab se Saturday IPL matches mein dine-in covers thode kam rehte hain par delivery orders badh jaate hain. Aapka Buy 1 Get 1 offer toh Tue-Thu ke liye hai, par kya aaj ke match ke liye koi special delivery combo push karein? Aapke area mein 'match night offer' searches 65% up hain. Kya main top 50 customers ko ek message bhej doon?
rationale: Leveraging the local IPL match to suggest a delivery-focused pivot since Saturday matches typically dip in dine-in but spike in delivery searches. [anchor=DC vs MI, lever=specificity(+curiosity), trigger=ipl_match_today:u3, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1]

body: Hi Suresh, quick update—Mylari South Indian Cafe abhi 145 reviews par hai. Just 5 more to hit the 150 milestone! Aapka current review count city average 142 se already upar nikal gaya hai. Is milestone ko celebrate karne ke liye should we push a small 'Thank You' post to your followers?
rationale: Celebrating an imminent review milestone while anchoring on the peer average to build social proof. [anchor=142, lever=social_proof(+reciprocity), trigger=milestone_reached:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Karim, Lucknow mein abhi mini-bridal window start ho rahi hai. Wedding industry intel ke according, April-May mein annual bridal volume ka 15% cover hota hai jo aksar salons miss kar dete hain. Aapke Alambagh location ke liye 'Bridal Trial @ ₹999' ka offer run karna kaisa rahega? Pre-wedding skincare packages push karne ka ye sahi time hai. Kya main iska ek draft ready kar doon?
rationale: Leveraging the seasonal bridal window trend to suggest a high-intent service. [anchor=15%, lever=reciprocity+curiosity, trigger=research_digest:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Sushma, The Beauty Bar ki performance check kar rahi thi. Aapke profile views 2547 hain, par calls abhi 22 par hi hain—jo ki city average 28 se thoda kam hai. April-May bridal window start ho raha hai, so it's a good time to capture that demand. Kya main aapka profile audit karun to see how we can boost these numbers?
rationale: Merchant calls are below the city average of 28 despite healthy views. Using the secondary bridal window trend to encourage a profile audit. [anchor=28, lever=reciprocity, trigger=perf_dip:u3, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1]

body: Hi Saanvi, it's been a month since your last visit on 2026-04-01. Summer heat is here, so it's the perfect time for a hair spa or a quick trim to keep your hair healthy. Would you like to drop by this week? Reply 1 for Wednesday morning, 2 for Thursday evening, or let us know a time that works for you.
rationale: Re-engaging a regular customer exactly one month after her last visit to maintain her 9-visit streak. [anchor=2026-04-01, lever=loss_aversion(+specificity), trigger=recall_due:u3, send_as=merchant_on_behalf, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Lakshmi, Diwali is still 188 days away, but the April-May mini-bridal window is starting now. Kapra mein bridal-trial searches +28% up hain. Aapka Bridal Trial @ ₹999 offer kaafi relevant rahega abhi. Should I help you promote this to your lapsed clients?
rationale: Skipping the distant Diwali trigger to focus on the immediate April-May bridal window which is more relevant for a salon. [anchor=188, lever=specificity+curiosity, trigger=festival_upcoming:u1, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1]

body: Paras ji, aapka Pro subscription expire ho gaya hai. Last 30 days mein aapke profile par 4171 views aaye hain, par bina active plan ke ye visibility drop ho sakti hai. Agle mahine ke liye bridal season trends aur new leads miss na ho jayein. Kya main aapko next month ka plan aur benefits samjha doon?
rationale: Using high view count as a loss-aversion anchor to encourage renewal now that the subscription has expired. [anchor=4171, lever=loss_aversion, trigger=renewal_due:u4, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]

body: Hi Renu, Beauty Lounge by Renu ke liye Gomti Nagar mein views 2945 tak pahunch gaye hain, which is great. Par maine notice kiya ki calls mein 18% ki girawat aayi hai recently. Wedding season opener (April-May) start ho raha hai, toh kya hum 'Bridal Trial @ ₹999' wala offer active karein to boost bookings? Reply YES agar aap chahein toh main setup kar doon.
rationale: Since the trigger was a placeholder, I anchored on the merchant's actual performance metrics (views and call drop) and locality to provide a relevant seasonal suggestion for the April-May bridal window. [anchor=Gomti Nagar, lever=reciprocity(+loss_aversion), trigger=review_theme_emerged:u3, send_as=vera, prompt_v=1.0]
